settings.heading: Shipping Policy
settings.intro: How and when your order gets to you.

settings.content:
Free shipping

Enjoy free Standard shipping on all orders over $125. The discount is applied automatically at checkout — no code needed.

Shipping options & rates

Pick the speed that suits you at checkout. Your exact shipping rate is calculated there based on your destination and the option you choose — so you'll always see the final cost before you pay, with no surprises. Rates may vary by location and delivery speed. Estimated delivery windows include order processing.

  • Economy · estimated 7–14 business days
  • Standard · estimated 5–14 business days — free on orders over $125
  • Express · estimated 3–7 business days

Close to $125? It's worth adding that one more item — Standard shipping is on us once your order passes $125.

Order processing & tracking

Most orders are prepared and dispatched within 1–3 business days. You'll receive an order confirmation when you check out, and a tracking link by email once your order ships. You can also follow your order from your account.

Important notes

Delivery estimates are not guaranteed and may be affected by carrier delays, customs, weather, or high-volume periods. If your order hasn't arrived within the estimated window, contact us and we'll help track it down. If we are unable to ship your order within the estimated time frame, we'll notify you, and you may choose to wait or cancel your order for a full refund.

Questions?

Reach our team any time at Alvaro.herard@emporx.com or through our Contact page.
